versions.version_description: Based on studio version, could be.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]  x2


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]                [ch]Ab[/ch]
How can I convince you, what you see is real?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                        [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Who am I to blame you for doubting what you feel?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Bb/D[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch]
I was always reaching, you were just a girl I  knew.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I took for granted the friend I have in you.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
I was living for a dream, loving for a moment.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/A[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Taking on the world, that was just my style.[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
Now I look into your eyes, I can see forever.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
The search is over, you were with me all the while.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]                [ch]Ab[/ch]
Can we last forever, will we fall apart?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]                           [ch]Gsus[/ch]
At times it's so uncertain, these questions of the heart.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]                  [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb/D[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch]
You've followed me through changes, and patiently you'd wait, Till I came to[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Gsus[/ch]
my senses through some miracle of fate.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]      [ch]F/A[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I was living for a dream, loving for a moment.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/A[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
    Taking on the world, that was just my style.[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Now I look into your eyes, I can see forever.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
The search is over, you were with me all the while.[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Eb/D[/ch]  [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]
Now the   miles stretch out behind me, loves that I have lost.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Eb/D[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]
Broken  hearts lie victims of the game.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fm[/ch]            [ch]Cm[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]               ([ch]Eb/Ab[/ch])
Then good luck, it finally struck like lightning from the blue.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Eb/G[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Every highway leads me back to you.[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]
Now at last I hold you, now all is said and done.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                       [ch]Eb/Ab[/ch]
The search has come full circle.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                [ch]Gsus4[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Our destinies are one.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Bb/D[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch]
So if you ever loved me, show me that you give  a   damn.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
You'll know for certain the man I really am.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
I was living for a dream, loving for a moment.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/A[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Taking on the world, that was just my style.[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
Now I look into your eyes, I can see forever.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
The search is over, you were with me all the while.[/tab]


[Finale]

[tab]                    [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
Then I touched your hands, I can hear you whisper:[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
The Search is over, Love was right before my eyes.[/tab]

[ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]  x3
